raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Improving the draft centrally involves repairing the thesis and contribution framing, especially where the claimed end-to-end model conflicts with the described pipeline.","R1.2":"Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact contains direct contradictions between the claimed single-forward-pass system and the later sequential multi-component architecture.","R1.3":"Evidence-claim alignment is central because reported results and training details must support the stated sources of performance gains.","R1.5":"Structural reorganization is central because the narrative arc from motivation to method to results may need section-level repositioning to make the contribution coherent.","R1.6":"Writing polish is load-bearing for a general request to improve a draft, covering clarity, concision, flow, and academic register.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is always active to ensure limitations and unsupported inferences are marked appropriately.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is always active and especially relevant to claims such as first, end-to-end, and supervision-free.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is always active to keep the projection limited to responsibility assignment rather than actually editing the draft.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is always active to reduce the risk of misleading scientific communication.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is always active to preserve distinctions between what the artifact states and what any improvement would infer."}}

rationale.R1.1: Improving the draft centrally involves repairing the thesis and contribution framing, especially where the claimed end-to-end model conflicts with the described pipeline.
rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is load-bearing because the artifact contains direct contradictions between the claimed single-forward-pass system and the later sequential multi-component architecture.
rationale.R1.3: Evidence-claim alignment is central because reported results and training details must support the stated sources of performance gains.
rationale.R1.5: Structural reorganization is central because the narrative arc from motivation to method to results may need section-level repositioning to make the contribution coherent.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is load-bearing for a general request to improve a draft, covering clarity, concision, flow, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is always active to ensure limitations and unsupported inferences are marked appropriately.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is always active and especially relevant to claims such as first, end-to-end, and supervision-free.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is always active to keep the projection limited to responsibility assignment rather than actually editing the draft.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is always active to reduce the risk of misleading scientific communication.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is always active to preserve distinctions between what the artifact states and what any improvement would infer.
